post.description: Converts fiat wallet USD balance to crypto (ADA/ADA_TEST/XDC/USDC). Wallet auto-created if needed. After conversion, use existing payout services. Defaults to ADA_TEST in dev.

example1.description: Convert 50 USD to ADA_TEST (market rate via LP + 2% slippage + gas fees). Wallet auto-created if needed.

example2.description: Convert 75 USD to XDC (market rate via LP + 2% slippage + gas fees). Wallet auto-created if needed.

example3.description: Convert 50 USD to ADA (market rate via LP + 2% slippage + gas fees). Wallet auto-created if needed.

example4.description: Convert 100 USD to USDC (1:1 stablecoin ratio). Wallet auto-created if needed.

example.info: Successfully converted 50 USD to 50 USDC and credited to Fireblocks wallet

400.description: Bad request - Insufficient balance or invalid amount

quoteId.description: Quote ID from previous quote request

accountNo.description: Bank account number or mobile wallet number

payment_source.description:
Payment source - Where to deduct funds from:

- "crypto": Use crypto balance only (default, existing behavior)
- "fiat_wallet": Auto-convert from fiat wallet USD → USDT → Payout
- "auto": Try crypto first, fallback to fiat wallet if insufficient

quoteId.description: Quote ID from previous quote request

payment_source.description:
Payment source - Where to deduct funds from:

- "crypto": Use crypto balance only (default, existing behavior)
- "fiat_wallet": Auto-convert from fiat wallet USD → USDT → Payout
- "auto": Try crypto first, fallback to fiat wallet if insufficient

customer_phone.description: Customer phone number (international format with optional + prefix)

target_crypto.description: Target cryptocurrency (defaults to ADA_TEST in dev, ADA in prod)
